creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Breaks backwards compatibility and thus the two ports (lang/pike78 and
sysutils/rdup) that depend on this one.

I've contacted the maintainer of lang/pike78 and asked him to let me
know when the upstream authors update it to use this new version of
nettle.

I maintain sysutils/rdup and have contacted its author myself.
